scope.summary: Carry rich Zalo message metadata through the cloud hosted backend and render it in the cloud-only desktop UI.
goals: Persist quote, link preview, sticker, attachment/media metadata, reaction, and delete state for hosted cloud messages
Encrypt rich message metadata at rest alongside message bodies
Expose rich message metadata from the cloud messages API without returning Zalo credentials
Hydrate cloud conversations into existing ChatMessage fields for quote/link/reaction/delete/sticker/file-like previews
Handle hosted realtime reaction and undo events without requiring a new message to arrive
nonGoals: Downloading arbitrary remote Zalo media bytes into S3
Production media transcoding or thumbnail generation

acceptance.description: Cloud message rows can carry encrypted rich metadata, list API decrypts it into quote/link/sticker/file/reaction fields, and desktop cloud hydration renders those fields instead of dropping them.

verification.manual: Attach backend/frontend gates plus API or unit evidence proving rich metadata roundtrip and plaintext-leak scan for encrypted rows.

acceptance.description: Hosted reaction and undo listener events update cloud rows and notify desktop realtime subscribers to rehydrate.

verification.manual: Attach test or runtime smoke proving reaction/delete events are mapped to DB updates and realtime notification payloads.
